positive: A retro mid-century modern travel poster advertising a picnic in the desert. Features stylized atomic-age architecture, geometric patterns, and a vintage car. Limited color palette (mustard yellow, teal, burnt orange), screen-print texture, bold graphic design, inspired by Saul Bass.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealism, gradient mesh, digital painting, modern typography, excessive detail
